userDefinedCodeListEntries.entryDescription: Implements APDS 4.1 native data routes with the APX data profile (Full/Change, tombstones, cursor change feed).
Implements the APX delivery fabric over APDS /webhooks with HMAC signing and the normative retry schedule.
Implements the SSE event stream with Last-Event-ID resume.
Implements the command plane, lane inquiry, validations, and device status.
Implements the alert resource and lifecycle.
Implements account lookup, take-payment, and accounting write-back.
Implements payment history lookup by ticket.
Implements LPR plate/ticket cross-lookup over APDS Observations.
Implements the reservations profile over APDS quotes and assigned rights.
Implements the permits profile over RightSpecification, RightPool, and Credential.
Implements TollTransaction and its dispute lifecycle.
Optional hardening: mutual TLS on all APX endpoints.
